style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow with intense orange-red light, emitting shimmering heat waves that distort the air around Jigglypuff. Ember sparks float upward in lazy spirals, crackling with golden-orange energy, while a vibrant crimson aura pulses gently around its body. The atmosphere radiates a warm amber glow, casting dynamic shadows that flicker like dancing flames. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
